title.en: It's no big deal! 별일 아니야! 뭐가 문제야?

description.en: When you want to reassure a friend who is anxious about a small mistake or minor worry! Practice reacting coolly with 별일 아니야 and 뭐가 문제야.
description.ko: 작은 실수나 사소한 걱정에 불안해하는 친구를 안심시켜 주고 싶을 때! 별일 아니야와 뭐가 문제야를 사용해 쿨하게 반응해 봅니다.

tags: Reaction. Reassurance. Perspective. Cool. Daily Life

content.speaker: John
content.text: What's up world! Welcome back. You are listening to... "Real Reaction!" I'm your host. John.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 존. 제가 오늘 방송 녹음하러 오다가 커피를 조금 쏟았어요.
content.translation: John. I spilled some coffee while coming to record the show today.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 옷에 얼룩이 살짝 묻었는데. 카메라에 이상하게 보이지 않을까요?
content.translation: A small stain got on my clothes. Won't it look strange on camera?

content.speaker: John
content.text: That's it? Big deal! 별일 아니야.
content.translation: That's it? Big deal! It's not a big deal.

content.speaker: John
content.text: Nobody's going to notice such a tiny stain. 뭐가 문제야?
content.translation: Nobody's going to notice such a tiny stain. What's the problem?

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 휴...., 다행이네요. 존이 그렇게 말해 주니까 마음이 편해졌어요!
content.translation: Phew. That's a relief. Since you say that. my mind is at ease!

content.speaker: John
content.text: 별일 아니야. This is a perfect way to say "It's nothing."

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 네. 말 그대로 특별한 일이 아니라는 뜻이에요.
content.translation: Yes. It literally means it's not a special event.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 친구가 사소한 실수를 하고 걱정할 때 가장 따뜻하고 쿨하게 해줄 수 있는 말이죠.
content.translation: It's the warmest and coolest thing you can say when a friend makes a minor mistake and worries about it.

content.speaker: John
content.text: 별일 아니야.

content.speaker: John
content.text: Then what about 뭐가 문제야.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 이건 "그래서 문제 될 게 전혀 없는데?"라는 뉘앙스를 담고 있어요.
content.translation: This carries the nuance of 'So there's absolutely no problem here?'

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 상대방의 걱정이 기우라는 걸 알려주고 싶을 때 아주 효과적이에요.
content.translation: It's very effective when you want to let the other person know their worry is unnecessary.

content.speaker: John
content.text: 뭐가 문제야?

content.speaker: John
content.text: Okay. let's try a situation. Imagine I'm freaking out because I made a tiny typo in our script today.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 존. 왜 그렇게 당황하고 있어요? 무슨 일이라도 생겼어요?
content.translation: John. why are you so flustered? Did something happen?

content.speaker: John
content.text: Look! I typed "Reacton" instead of "Reaction" in the intro! Oh no. I'm so sorry!

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 에이. 존. 별일 아니야.
content.translation: Geez. John. it's not a big deal.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 누구나 그럴 수 있죠. 그냥 넘어가면 돼요.
content.translation: Anyone can do that. You can just skip over it.

content.speaker: John
content.text: But it's our show's name! People might think I'm unprofessional.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 뭐가 문제야? 존의 완벽한 발음이 다 커버해 줄 텐데 말이에요.
content.translation: What's the problem? Since your perfect pronunciation will cover it all anyway.

content.speaker: John
content.text: You're right. Mina. It's just a small typo. No big deal!

content.speaker: John
content.text: Don't sweat the small stuff. Life is too short!

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 맞아요. 가끔은 사소한 일에 너무 힘 빼지 말고 툭툭 털어내는 연습도 필요해요.
content.translation: Right. Sometimes you need to practice shaking off minor things without putting too much energy into them.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 오늘 배운 쿨한 표현들로 주변 친구들을 안심시켜 보세요!
content.translation: Reassure your friends with the cool expressions we learned today!

content.speaker: John
content.text: Let's review our "no big deal" reactions one last time.

content.speaker: John
content.text: 별일 아니야! It's no big deal!

content.speaker: John
content.text: 뭐가 문제야? What's the problem?

content.speaker: John
content.text: 그게 뭐 어때서? So what about that?

content.speaker: John
content.text: 대수롭지 않아! It's not a big matter!

content.speaker: John
content.text: 신경 쓰지 마! Don't worry about it!

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 여러분도 오늘 작은 일에 흔들리지 않는 당당하고 멋진 하루 보내시길 바랄게요.
content.translation: I hope you all have a confident and great day today without being shaken by small things.

content.speaker: John
content.text: That's all for today. See you in the next episode.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 다음에 또 만나요. 안녕~!
content.translation: See you again next time. Bye~!

vocabulary.example: 오늘은 별일 없이 조용하게 지나갔어요. (Today passed quietly without any special events.)
그건 전혀 큰 문제가 아니에요. (That's not a big problem at all.)
옷에 묻은 커피 얼룩이 잘 안 지워지네요. (The coffee stain on the clothes is not coming off well.)
소식을 듣고 이제야 안심이 되네요. (Now I feel relieved after hearing the news.)

vocabulary.meaning: To be trivial. To be unimportant
vocabulary.example: 저는 그런 사소한 일은 대수롭지 않게 생각해요. (I don't think much of such trivial matters.)
너무 걱정하지 마세요. 그냥 기우일 뿐이에요. (Don't worry too much. It's just an unnecessary worry.)
